title: schema from declared table...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name VARCHAR(50), age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO t2 (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT id, name, age FROM t2 WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name FROM t2 WHERE age < (SELECT AVG(age) FROM t2 WHERE age IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: SELECT statement on declared table schema
